design_decisions.summary: Driver struct is cliDriver in internal/model/cli.go, separate from direct-API drivers.
design_decisions.rationale: Keeps subprocess logic isolated; shares same Verifier interface.

design_decisions.summary: NewClient() adds claude-cli returning *cliDriver; codex returns a deferral error (S63-deferral-1).
design_decisions.rationale: Claude-CLI ships first; codex is deferred with different invocation/normalisation.

design_decisions.summary: FromEnv() adds early return for claude-cli/codex BEFORE proxy routing — no API key check.
design_decisions.rationale: Subscription-based drivers bypass API-key gate and proxy routing entirely.

design_decisions.summary: Binary override via CLAUDE_BIN / CODEX_BIN env vars for testing.
design_decisions.rationale: Mirrors reference driver's convention; absent defaults to claude/codex on PATH.

open_deferrals.description: Codex exec support deferred — different invocation shapes and output normalisation from claude-cli. Claude-CLI ships first.
